title: Radiant Horizons
description: A optimized modpack for a enjoyable and steady playthrough.
body: ![A beautiful scenic view of a plains biome with a body of water and mountains in the background.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ccfe8f0b6083174ee5a84cf0c9d6c7519e3f70a6.webp)A beautiful modpack keeping the vanilla essence of the game while still adding beautiful, realistic shaders and new structures to explore, while also having great optimization allowing for smooth and enjoyable gameplay.
